name: pdf-tools-compdf
tagline: ClawHub (95★): PDF Toolkit handles mixed PDF workflows with a flexible toolset for page organization, basic editing, viewing, and general d
verdict: Security and quality are both solid (A), but the trigger description is a 619-character wall mixing overview, phrases, and examples, undermining clean auto-dispatch. It never states exclusions despite covering a broad multi-tool surface, and carries no version or changelog to track drift.

highlights.summary: The 'When to Run' section lists only positive triggers; nowhere does the skill state exclusions, out-of-scope cases, or point to a better-suited skill, despite covering a broad mul
Full description is 619 characters, a paragraph-length wall stacking overview text, a trigger-phrase list, and three example queries into one dispatch field rather than a terse, se
No version field in frontmatter and no changelog/dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
